# Karan Sud

> Senior content and growth strategist with 5+ years building brands from the
> ground up across Web3, DeFi, AI, F&B, e-commerce, and creator/personal brands.
> Runs content, community, and paid acquisition as one connected system.

## Who he is
Karan Sud is a marketer who pairs strategy with hands-on execution: brand
positioning, content systems, community building (Discord/Telegram), KOL and
influencer programs, paid media (Meta/Google), email, and executive personal
branding. He also builds and ships his own web frontends (this site is a custom
Next.js build).

## Selected results
- Fere AI: 12,000+ AI product signups, 400-500 daily active users, 6.8M X impressions.
- FanTV AI: grew a brand account from 70K to 300K followers; built a 150K+ member community.
- Defx: grew a perpetuals DEX from under $100K to $50M+ monthly volume ($1.5B cumulative, verified on DefiLlama).
- Novaswap: $650K+ organic trading volume in 90 days from a standing start.
- Tony Roma's: 729K Facebook views, +448% 3-second video views, fully organic.
- Potters' Hub: 471% month-one ROI on paid social for a D2C launch.
- The Sportrush: grew Instagram from 26 to 4,500 followers with 7M+ views in 3 months.

## Industries
Web3 and DeFi, AI products, food and beverage, e-commerce / D2C, luxury home,
sports media, and executive/founder personal brands.

## How to work with him
- Email: contactkaransud@gmail.com
- LinkedIn: https://linkedin.com/in/karansud7
- X: https://twitter.com/KaranSudSocial
- Book a call: https://calendly.com/contactkaransud/30min
- Status: open to select projects.
